description: Redesign Splash, Login, OTP screens with Google Auth, animations, and premium branding
steps: Rewrite the _SplashScreen in mobile/lib/core/router/app_router.dart - animated logo with scale + fade-in animation (AnimationController + CurvedAnimation), emerald gradient background, app name with Manrope font, pulsing loading indicator

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/auth/presentation/login_screen.dart with: gradient background (emerald to dark), app logo/branding at top with animation, 'Sign in with Google' button (white button with Google icon, elevated card style), divider with 'or' text, phone number OTP section (existing flow preserved), smooth transitions between elements, terms of service text at bottom

Add Google sign-in functionality: create mobile/lib/features/auth/data/google_auth_service.dart that calls the backend API endpoint for Google OAuth (POST /auth/google with idToken). For now, use a simulated flow since google_sign_in package requires native setup. The button should call the auth repository which hits the API.
Add loginWithGoogle method to mobile/lib/features/auth/data/auth_repository.dart that sends the Google ID token to the backend

Redesign mobile/lib/features/auth/presentation/otp_screen.dart with: animated pin input fields (individual boxes that scale on focus), countdown timer with circular progress indicator, resend button with cooldown, animated verification success state, gradient accents
acceptance_criteria: Splash screen has animated logo with scale and fade-in effects
Login screen has Google sign-in button prominently displayed
Login screen has gradient background and premium branding
OTP screen has individual animated pin boxes
Google auth service exists and calls backend endpoint
verification: Verify login_screen.dart contains Google sign-in button widget
Verify splash screen in app_router.dart has AnimationController
Verify otp_screen.dart has animated pin input
